Event: The Dark Adventure
Event Date: 25/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR255
Dark Knight Gear

After every 2 attacks, the armor wearer gains a shield that blocks 400000 damage. The shield exists for up to 5 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.
Whenever the ability is triggered 2 times, the unit's damage is increased by 20% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements: 98-100
